auth.resetLinkInvalid: This password reset link is missing or invalid.
auth.resetLinkExpired: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.

dashboard.title: Dashboard

chatbots.aiBehaviorDesc: Use guided settings instead of one large prompt.

campaigns.title: Campaign Links
campaigns.subtitle: Create trackable wa.me links for your ad campaigns
campaigns.createTrackableLinks: Create trackable WhatsApp links for your ads on any platform
campaigns.step1Desc: Pick your ad platform, name your campaign, and get a unique WhatsApp link with a tracking code.
campaigns.step2Desc: Paste the generated link as your ad's CTA button or URL. Works with any ad platform.
campaigns.step3Desc: Customer clicks the ad — WhatsApp opens with a pre-filled message containing the campaign code.
campaigns.step4Desc: Tawasel detects the code, tags the lead with the platform & campaign name. Track ROI per ad!
campaigns.codeReferenceDesc: Each platform has a 2-letter prefix. The code is automatically added to the customer's first message.
campaigns.codeExample: Example: A Snapchat summer sale ad → code
campaigns.campaignNameHint: Use letters, numbers, and hyphens. This identifies your campaign in analytics.
campaigns.noNumbersConnected: No WhatsApp numbers connected. Go to Channels to connect one first.
campaigns.prefilledMessagePlaceholder: The message customers will see when they open WhatsApp
campaigns.prefilledMessageHint: This is what the customer sees in the message box. The campaign code is added automatically at the end.
campaigns.previewLabel: Preview — What the customer sees on WhatsApp
campaigns.howToUseOn: How to Use This Link on {{platform}}

home.heroTitle: The WhatsApp CRM Built for Teams That Sell on Chat
home.heroSubtitle: Turn WhatsApp conversations into closed deals. Tawasel gives your team a shared inbox, AI chatbot, CRM pipeline, and broadcast campaigns — all in one platform.
